name: cc-antigravity-plugin
description: Integrate Antigravity CLI (AGY) for long-context code exploration with model selection and conversation continuity

default_model.title: Default AGY Model
default_model.description: Model to use when --model is not specified. Default Gemini Flash medium is best for most tasks; use gemini-3.1-pro-low for harder reasoning, or pass Claude models explicitly with --model.

timeout.title: Default Timeout
timeout.description: Default timeout for AGY print mode, for example 3m, 300s, or 5m0s.
